data.title: Intercontinental Exchange Approves Second Quarter Dividend of $0.52 per Share
data.description: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE), a top provider of financial market technology and data for global capital markets, has declared a dividend of $0.52 per share for the second quarter of 2026. This marks an 8% increase from the $0.48 per share dividend distributed in the second quarter of 2025. The cash dividend will be paid out on June 30, 2026, to stockholders who are recorded as of June 15, 2026. The ex-dividend date is also set for June 15, 2026.

data.title: Fora Named One of TIME100 Most Influential Companies 2026
data.description: A prominent travel agency known as Fora has recently earned recognition by being included in TIME's prestigious TIME100 Most Influential Companies list for 2026. This ranking recognizes companies that have demonstrated an outstanding influence on a global scale. Additionally, Fora was specifically acknowledged as a TIME100 Companies Industry Leader in the Travel sector for the same year. The recognition serves as a testament to the remarkable impact that Fora has made in the travel industry.

data.title: HI-VIEW RESOURCES COMMENCES TRADING ON AMERICA’S OTCQB MARKETPLACE UNDER “GXLDF”
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 30, 2026, Hi-View Resources Inc. (referred to as Hi-View or the Company) revealed that its common shares are now being traded on the OTCQB Venture Market under the symbol "GXLDF". This move (trading under CSE: GXLD; OTCQB: GXLDF; FSE: B630) is aimed at boosting visibility among U.S. investors and enhancing trading convenience for shareholders.

data.title: 137 Ventures Raises Over $700 Million Across Two New Funds, Surpasses $15 Billion in AUM
data.description: A growth-stage venture firm, 137 Ventures, based in San Francisco, revealed on April 30, 2026, that they are supporting long-standing technology leaders such as Anduril, Gusto, Ramp, and SpaceX by extending their private lifecycles. This firm has successfully backed these companies, and it just sealed a deal to continue its support.

data.title: Treasury secretary reveals US seized over $500M in Iranian crypto assets, exceeding the reported $344M freeze.
data.description: The Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced that the United States has successfully confiscated approximately $500 million in cryptocurrency assets linked to Iran. This amount exceeds the previously disclosed freeze of $344 million.

data.title: Shinhan Card from South Korea partners with Solana Foundation to trial stablecoin payments and test DeFi services.
data.description: Shinhan Card has entered into an agreement with the Solana Foundation to broaden stablecoin payment trials and investigate non-custodial wallets and DeFi services. This partnership aims to explore innovative financial technologies and enhance services provided by Shinhan Card to its customers. The collaboration signifies the growing interest in digital payment solutions and the potential for decentralized finance to revolutionize traditional banking systems. The agreement highlights the commitment of both parties to push the boundaries of fintech and provide cutting-edge services. This development showcases the increasing importance of collaboration between traditional financial institutions and blockchain projects for the advancement of the industry.

data.title: Draft Australian payments plan suggests stablecoins & tokenized fiat could revolutionize money movement on future rails.
data.description: A preliminary plan for Australia's internal payment system suggests that stablecoins and tokenized fiat currency could potentially transform the way money is transferred through upcoming channels.

data.title: APi Group Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) based in New Brighton, Minnesota, has released its financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company's President and CEO, Russ Becker, announced a promising beginning to the year, with a 10% increase in organic net revenue and a 70 basis points rise in adjusted EBITDA margins compared to the previous year. These positive results were driven by growth in both the Safety Services and Specialty Services segments. The company did not disclose further details regarding specific revenue or earnings figures.

data.title: PHINIA Reports First Quarter 2026 Results - Strategic Business Wins Advance Diversification Across End Markets and Alternative Fuels
data.description: PHINIA Inc., a renowned industrial supplier and global innovator in fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket solutions, recently announced its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. During this quarter, the company recorded impressive net sales of $878 million, signifying a notable 10.3% rise from the previous year's first quarter. This increase in net sales equated to $39 million and $14 million when excluding the effects of foreign currency fluctuations and the SEM acquisition, respectively.
